name: Fate and Chaos
author: Mateo Price
bootlegger: All players have Fabled / Loric Characters attached to them. When the player dies, their Fabled / Loric becomes out of play. All players know eachother's Loric / Fabled.
Once a Fabled / Loric leaves play, its affects cease immeadiately.
Spirit of Ivory and Gardener cannot be in play.
When the Deus ex Fiasco dies, a mistake must be made by the same time the next day.
The Bootlegger adds 1 extra rule of the storyteller's choice.
The amneisac cannot affect the above rules.
